title: Models from Garden Route excel in national competition
description: GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Local models have done...
bodyText:
Gallery

GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - Local models have done extremely well in a national competition held in Gauteng.

For the second year, about 20 models from the ACE Models MossGeorge branch took part in the annual ACE Models national competition.


> Vanderbijlpark


It was held in Vanderbijlpark from 25 to 28 October.

In the competition the MossGeorge team competed against about 20 ACE Models franchises from throughout South Africa.

There was a total of about 400 models in the competition.

View a gallery here: https://shorturl.at/NxqiQ


> Titles


The ACE Models MossGeorge members won the following titles:

Body

Chloe Brooks - Top 5 body beautiful

Gia Gerber - Top 5 body beautiful (winner)

Kaylin Wilke - Top 5 body beautiful

Ferdi Bergh - Top 5 body beautiful

Karli Puren - Photographic model of the year

Ferdi Bergh - Editorial model of the year

Catwalk

Loandre Olivier - Top 5 catwalk beginner

Karli - Top 5 catwalk beginner

Chloe - Top 5 catwalk beginner

Kaylin - Top 5 runway beginner

Ferdi - Top 5 catwalk adult beginner (winner)

Pageant

Loandre - Top 5 pageant casting

Karli - Top 5 pageant beginner

Gia - Top 5 pageant beginner

Sanchia Petersen - Top 5 pageant beginner (winner)

Ferdi - Top 5 pageant beginner

Overall

Loandre - Top 5 overall beginner

Karli - Top 5 overall beginner

Gia - Top 5 overall beginner

Sanchia - Top 5 overall beginner

Ferdi - Top 5 overall beginner

Beginner showcase

For the second year, the MossGeorge branch won the "beginner showcase".

It shared this win with ACE Models Rosebank.

Elani Pretorius and Riekie Clift are the two directors of the MossGeorge branch.

Pretorius said: "I am humbled and unbelievably proud of every dear model and so grateful for all the support we have received.

“I can see how the models grew over the past year and it was good to see how they worked together as a team and supported one another."

Sanchia Petersen was one of the achievers. With her here is Elani Pretorius.We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news.
